case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. CHELSEA HERRICK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRICK, CHELSEA $8,707.21 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,857.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100039537) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100038859), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED OCT-12-2018, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE OCT-01-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT HERRICK, CHELSEA
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HERRICK, CHELSEA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAY-17-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039537) FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRICK, CHELSEA ALSO FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-17-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
